rationale: Search extended across title/path/description/frontmatter/body with TD-029 precedence; ArtifactEdge.snippet added with marker-wrapped context window; 256KB size cap and binary-extension+NUL-sniff skip enforced; pagination preserved through existing sort path; resolver tests added (373 lines).

findings.summary: Schema docstring says snippet is null for non-body matches, but implementation populates it for any match (title/path/description/frontmatter/body). Minor doc/behavior mismatch — behavior matches AC; consider tightening the schema comment.
